none.justification: Correctly enumerates all 10 allocation sites and separates the local decrRefCount cases from the ownership-transfer cases, including the incrDecrCommand/incrbyfloatCommand/increxCommand new-value objects. Minor naming imprecision for a few enclosing functions does not affect the lifecycle classification.

ccodegraph.justification: Fully matches the GT: all local frees are listed with the correct decrRefCount lines, and all new-value allocations are correctly classified as transferred to the DB with no local decrRefCount.

codegraph.justification: Fully correct per the rubric: it identifies all allocation sites, including the two mutually exclusive increxCommand new-value allocations, and correctly distinguishes temporary local objects from DB-owned value objects.

cbm.justification: Correctly lists the 6 local allocation sites and 4 ownership-transfer allocation sites with the expected functions and destinations. The small summary slip about distinct line count is immaterial to the requested classification.
